channel.title: Ente development digest
channel.description: AI-generated daily digest of PRs opened and merged in the Ente monorepo

item.title: Ente digest Jul 24, 2026 - 24 shipped, 2 in progress
item.description:
Today’s changes span Photos, Space, Auth, and Ensu, with several user-facing improvements alongside infrastructure and privacy hardening. A major highlight is faster on-device ML indexing, while Ensu gains opt-in knowledge packs.

Shipped

  • Photos and Space: Space now supports viewing friends’ cover photos, editing captions, managing friend requests, messaging or unfriending friends, smoother feed and avatar loading, and better action menus in PR #11648. Photos also gets a smoother web upload experience in PR #11649, a dismissible download-error toast in PR #11628, and favourite indicators for incoming shared photos in PR #11629.
  • Photos performance: Major mobile ML indexing optimizations reduce copying and processing overhead, improve model portability, and cautiously roll out Android WebGPU support in PR #11571.
  • Public sharing: Photos public album links now use the shorter albums.ente.com/TOKEN#KEY format, with matching mobile fallback and documentation updates in PR #11134.
  • Ensu: Ensu now has opt-in, on-device knowledge packs with download, update, cancellation, enablement, retrieval, and source-citation support across Android and iOS in PR #11617.
  • Auth and Locker: Auth adds more icons and aliases in PR #11546, while Locker removes the default text-input limit in PR #11537. Mobile settings also adds a “More from Ente” section with platform-aware app links in PR #11642.
  • Security and reliability: Share-password tokens now have shorter lifetimes in PR #11645, and account-recovery handling is safer against cleanup races in PR #11613. Documentation also gains new Auth, Photos, and Locker FAQs in PR #11635.

In progress

  • Photos web: A new search bar for the Assign Person dialog will make it easier to find people without scrolling through the full list in PR #11650.
  • Photos web: CollectionSelector and SingleInputDialog are being updated to their v2 versions in PR #11651.

item.title: Ente digest Jul 23, 2026 - 19 shipped, 4 in progress
item.description:
Today’s shipped work focuses on faster and more capable on-device processing in Photos and new on-device knowledge packs in Ensu. There are also several usability fixes across web and mobile, plus self-hosting and account-recovery improvements.

Shipped

  • Photos mobile: Major ML indexing optimizations reduce processing overhead and improve portability across iOS CoreML and Android WebGPU/XNNPACK. Unassigned face clusters can now be linked to contacts, and face clusters are sorted by photo count to make that picker easier to use.
  • Ensu: Opt-in on-device knowledge packs add downloadable, searchable packs with local retrieval, source citations, and controls to download, update, cancel, and enable them.
  • Photos mobile: Contact-first avatars now prefer saved contact names and photos across search, sharing, and family views. Incoming shared photos in Memories now show the favourite icon, and family member names appear on the storage-limit page.
  • Photos web: Chromecast receiver compatibility was fixed, while download toasts can now be dismissed when retries do not help.
  • Platform and self-hosting: Account recovery no longer races account cleanup; self-hosted API path prefixes are preserved; and the recent server CORS changes were reverted to simplify self-hosting.
  • Smaller shipped fixes include long user-agent handling in logout confirmation and access-token use for mobile family requests.

In progress

  • Server: Find scheduled deletions by email, retaining a keyed email hash for admin lookup and recovery verification.
  • Documentation: Add FAQ entries across the Auth, Photos, and Locker docs.
  • Ensu: Remove the parking_lot dependency.
  • Auth: Add DonanımHaber icon data to the custom icon set.
